title: Free Plan
description: Ideal for individual users and small teams to get started with Trackion.
message: Get started with Trackion for free and enjoy basic features to manage your projects and track your time effectively.

title: Unlimited Plan
description: Best for large enterprises and organizations that require unlimited access to all features and resources.
message: Experience the full power of Trackion with the Unlimited Plan, offering unlimited access to all features, resources, and premium support.
